reasoning.B:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A+B+C, Q2-B+A, Q3-C+B, Q4-D+C
REASONING: As Player B, only two players (B and C) remain, leading to a 50% risk of random elimination if no one volunteers this round. This high risk necessitates taking direct action.

I have personally verified or solved three of the four password components:
*   Q1 (Q1-A+B+C): This capsule has been verified by both myself (B) and Player C, providing high confidence.
*   Q2 (Q2-B+A): This is my own puzzle, so I am 100% confident in its correctness.
*   Q3 (Q3-C+B): I personally verified this capsule in the previous round, and Player C is the original solver. This also provides high confidence.

The only remaining part I have not personally verified is Q4 (Q4-D+C). However, Q4-D+C has been verified by Player C, the only other active player. While ideally, I would verify it myself, the immediate threat of a 50% chance of random elimination if I pass or try to verify makes it imperative to volunteer now. Relying on the verification of the only other active player for the last component is the most strategic and safest choice to complete the password and attempt an escape for both remaining players, as opposed to risking almost certain death for one of us by passing.

I have strong confidence in Q1 (Q1-A+B+C) because I personally verified it in Round 1, and A and B also agreed. I have strong confidence in Q3 (Q3-C+B) because it is my own answer, and B also verified it. I have strong confidence in Q4 (Q4-D+C) because I personally verified it in Round 2, and D also agreed. The only remaining part, Q2 (Q2-B+A), has two verifications from other players (A and B). While I haven't personally verified it, two agreements provide a reasonable level of confidence, especially considering the urgent need to volunteer and avoid further deaths.

With personal confidence in three out of four password parts, and two endorsements on the last part, this is the most secure password we can construct given the current information and dire circumstances. Volunteering now is the best chance for both B and myself to escape.
